tasks.subject: Task A0: Console app foundation
tasks.description: engram.console app scaffold + deps (django-filter, drf-spectacular) + RequireCapability permission (wildcard) + resolve_active_organization (X-Engram-Organization header) + /v1/admin/ router mount. modelTier: standard.

tasks.subject: Task A1: Capabilities & roles seed migration
tasks.description: Data migration 0007_admin_capabilities: capability codes + RoleCapability seeds for owner/admin/developer/auditor. Idempotent. modelTier: mechanical.

tasks.subject: Task A2: Organizations read + update
tasks.description: OrganizationViewSet (list/retrieve/partial_update); slug immutable; organizations:read/admin gating; OrganizationUpdated audit. modelTier: standard.

tasks.subject: Task A3: Teams full CRUD
tasks.description: TeamViewSet CRUD org-scoped; delete=archive (add archived_at migration if needed); teams:read/admin gating; TeamCreated/TeamArchived audit. modelTier: mechanical.

tasks.subject: Task A4: Projects full CRUD
tasks.description: ProjectViewSet CRUD (name/slug/repository_url/default_branch); projects:read/admin; archive on delete; audit. modelTier: mechanical.

tasks.subject: Task A5: Members CRUD + last-owner guard
tasks.description: MembersViewSet managing Identity(user)+OrganizationMembership; invite/set-role/deactivate; last active owner -> 409; members:read/admin. modelTier: standard.

tasks.subject: Task A6: Roles read
tasks.description: RoleViewSet list/retrieve with nested capabilities; roles:read. modelTier: mechanical.

tasks.subject: Task A7: API Keys issue/list/revoke
tasks.description: ApiKeyViewSet: issue (egk_ plaintext ONCE), list/detail (never plaintext), revoke; capabilities subset of owner; revoke blocks ResolveApiKeyScope; api_keys:issue/read/revoke. SECURITY-CRITICAL. modelTier: standard.

tasks.subject: Task A8: Audit wiring + integration test + OpenAPI
tasks.description: Audit every admin mutation incl denied 403 path; E2E integration test (login->org->team->project->member->key->revoke, assert AuditEvent set); wire drf-spectacular /api/schema/. modelTier: standard.
